issue.title: [False Negative]: add 12 phishing domains (go-trust[.]co[.]com, app[.]conigecko[.]live, ...)
issue.body:
> [!IMPORTANT] > ## Executive Summary > > This report documents 12 domain(s) that have been identified as part of active phishing operations. These domains exhibit characteristics consistent with malicious infrastructure and pose an immediate security risk to internet users. The following 12 domain(s) have been analyzed and confirmed as participating in phishing campaign(s): ``` go-trust.co.com app.conigecko.live simpleswapp.com 1lnch.fi-v2.to phanton-wallet.fi-v2.to rabby.fi-v2.to soiflare.fi-v2.to sunswap.nexus fusebox-elavon.org elevon-payment.com suitee-trezorrsuite.com trezorsafety.com ``` ## Threat Analysis ### Phishing Attack Details These domains are part of a phishing campaign targeting cryptocurrency companies and cryptocurrency holders/investors. Attackers may use fake login pages, fake Web3 wallet connection prompts, fake cryptocurrency exchange/swap interfaces, or modified/malicious software to steal cryptocurrency seed phrases/keys. ### Technical Details - Cloaked. This means: if a request does not meet certain internal rules of the attacker, the request may be redirected to a non-existent subdomain "www.www.", a legitimate website, or display various HTTP errors such as 403, 404, 502, etc., SSL certificate errors, infinite loading, or a fake Cloudflare (or other service) CAPTCHA, or show content distinguishable from the phishing page. ### Detections & Targeted Brands - `go-trust.co.com` targets Trust Wallet (trustwallet.com) - VirusTotal: **0 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/go-trust.co.com/detection - Listed on Spamhaus - https://check.spamhaus.org/results/?query=go-trust.co.com - `app.conigecko.live` targets CoinGecko (coingecko.com) - VirusTotal: **2 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/app.conigecko.live/detection - Listed on APVA - https://api.antiphish.org/v1/lookup?host=app.conigecko.live - `simpleswapp.com` targets SimpleSwap (simpleswap.io) - VirusTotal: **4 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/simpleswapp.com/detection - Listed on APVA - https://api.antiphish.org/v1/lookup?host=simpleswapp.com - `1lnch.fi-v2.to` targets 1inch (1inch.io) - VirusTotal: **12 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/1lnch.fi-v2.to/detection - `phanton-wallet.fi-v2.to` targets Phantom Wallet (phantom.com) - VirusTotal: **16 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/phanton-wallet.fi-v2.to/detection - Listed on APVA - https://api.antiphish.org/v1/lookup?host=phanton-wallet.fi-v2.to - `rabby.fi-v2.to` targets Rabby Wallet (rabby.io) - VirusTotal: **10 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/rabby.fi-v2.to/detection - Listed on APVA - https://api.antiphish.org/v1/lookup?host=rabby.fi-v2.to - `soiflare.fi-v2.to` targets Solflare (solflare.com) -
